subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the beauty of the All-Merciful! In these days when the lights of the Abhá Kingdom have encompassed all realms of existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بجمال رحمن در این ایام که انوار ملکوت ابهی عوالم وجود را احاطه نموده
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
